zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Martyn於1544年出生在英國英格蘭戴文黑福德時，他的父親Henry Martyn19歲，母親Mary Kenny23歲。他於1562年9月5日與Joane Harris在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年2月11日在英國英格蘭戴文斯托肯哈姆享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Martyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Martin   1.
Polish and Ukrainian: from the personal name Martyn (see Martin ).
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Martijn: variant of Martin 1.

variants.name: Martinkus
meanings: Lithuanian: adaptation of Polish Martynko, from a derivative of the personal name Martyn ‘Martin’.

variants.name: Martyniuk
meanings: Polish: patronymic from the personal name   Martyn  .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Martyn was born in 1544, in Sherford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Martyn, was 19 and his mother, Mary Kenny, was 23. He married Joane Harris on 5 September 1562, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 February 1614, in Stokenham, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Joane Harris le 5 septembre 1562, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 février 1614, à Stokenham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Martyn(이)가 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 셔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Martyn(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Kenny(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1562년 9월 5일 영국 데폰에서 Joane Harris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토켄함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Martyn родился в 1544 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Martyn было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Kenny, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Harris 5 сентября 1562 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 февраля 1614 г. в местности стокенам, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Martyn nació en 1544, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Martyn, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mary Kenny, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joane Harris el 5 de septiembre de 1562, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1614, en Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
